creator: burak.sn@outlook.com
text:
I am getting this error during boot on FreeBSD 14.0 Current 2023-Mar-16 12:25


https://download.freebsd.org/snapshots/amd64/amd64/ISO-IMAGES/14.0/FreeBSD-14.0-CURRENT-amd64-20230309-c581962414ed-261408-memstick.img.xz
